description: RouterOS syslog の長期 archive 集計 (Garage gold/ parquet を MyDuck 経由で query)。silver 2025-10-18 以降の全期間カバー。shinbunbun/dotfiles-private#263

panels.description: gold/volume をレベル別に集計、 routeros は service 列に 2M cardinality 汚染あり (bronze.ident 由来) のため group key から除外、 host=MikroTik 99.97% のため host も除外、 level のみで stack。

targets.rawSql: SELECT date AS time, level AS metric, sum(count)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date) GROUP BY date, level ORDER BY date, level

panels.title: Volume by level (日次)

panels.description: 範囲内で出現量 top-10 の template_id を抽出し、 日次 rate を描画。 anomaly detection は本 panel + 閾値が候補。 凡例は gold/template_dict (shinbunbun/dotfiles-private#269) と LEFT JOIN して template_text を表示 (先頭 60 文字)、 dict なき template は `tid=NNN` で fallback。

targets.rawSql: WITH dict AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (template_id) template_id, template_text FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/template_dict/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) ORDER BY template_id, date DESC), top_ids AS (SELECT template_id FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/template_rate/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date) GROUP BY template_id ORDER BY sum(count) DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT rate.date AS time, COALESCE(LEFT(dict.template_text, 60), 'tid=' || rate.template_id::TEXT)::TEXT AS metric, sum(rate.count)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/template_rate/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) AS rate LEFT JOIN dict ON dict.template_id = rate.template_id WHERE $__timeFilter(rate.date) AND rate.template_id IN (SELECT template_id FROM top_ids) GROUP BY rate.date, rate.template_id, dict.template_text ORDER BY rate.date, rate.template_id

panels.title: Top-10 template_id daily rate

panels.description: 日次で新規出現した template の件数。 routeros は新規ドリフト signal の S/N が 4 source 中ベスト (shinbunbun/dotfiles-private#264 motherduck 実測)。 急増は新サービス展開 / 新 attack signature / config 変更等のサイン。

targets.rawSql: SELECT date AS time, count(*)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/template_first_seen/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date) GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

panels.title: New template count (per day)

panels.description: 範囲内の新規 template 一覧 (新しい first_seen_ts 順)。 gold/template_dict (shinbunbun/dotfiles-private#269) と LEFT JOIN して template_text 列を表示 (先頭 100 文字)、 dict なき template は `(no dict)` で fallback。

targets.rawSql: WITH dict AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (template_id) template_id, template_text FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/template_dict/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) ORDER BY template_id, date DESC) SELECT fs.template_id, COALESCE(LEFT(dict.template_text, 100), '(no dict)') AS template_text, fs.first_seen_ts AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tokyo' AS first_seen_jst, fs.date AS first_seen_date FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/template_first_seen/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) AS fs LEFT JOIN dict ON dict.template_id = fs.template_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fs.date) ORDER BY fs.first_seen_ts DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: 新規 template 一覧 (range 内、新しい順)

panels.description: 範囲内の累計 volume rows。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(date) AS time, sum(count)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: Total rows (range)

panels.description: 範囲内に出現した unique template_id 数。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(date) AS time, count(DISTINCT template_id)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/template_rate/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: Unique templates (range)

panels.description: 範囲内に新規出現した template の累計。 急増は drift signal。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(date) AS time, count(*)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/template_first_seen/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: New templates (range)

panels.description: 範囲内に観測されている host (routeros は MikroTik 99.97% のはず、 他は wreckage 2 値)。 表示 host が 1 つだけなら正常。

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(date) AS time, count(DISTINCT host)::BIGINT AS value FROM read_parquet('s3://logs-archive/gold/volume/source=routeros/date=*/data.parquet', hive_partitioning=true) WHERE $__timeFilter(date)

panels.title: Distinct hosts (range)

title: Logs Archive - RouterOS
